reviews.review_description:
Here is my full video review: https://youtu.be/X5Csohb-uwI

IAI has surprised me to say the least. The whole idea that you have to complete the game with another player adds a unique twist that encourages teamwork, communication, and problem solving at another level.
The atmosphere/scenery make this game very intriguing. It builds a desire to continue to play just to see what is next.
The challenges/riddles so far have been a variety of difficulty and tasks. I was afraid it would become tedious or repetitive but it hasn't.
There are a few small bugs here and there still, however, the developers are quick to fix anything that is pointed out.
Overall, if you're looking for a fun/challenging game to play with a friend (or a stranger), this is definitely one to try!

Cooperative consideration of puzzles includes interest and immersion in the atmosphere, 
but at the initial levels I would like a hint button to properly understand the mechanics of secrets used by developers

reviews.review_title: Co-Op Puzzles in a Sci-Fi World
reviews.review_description:
IAI is a puzzle adventure set in a fragmented sci-fi world that immediately evokes the spirit of Zelda—with exploration, mystery, and dungeon-like challenges.

The game begins solo, but before long, you’ll need a partner to progress. Communication, coordination, and idea exchange are absolutely essential—without teamwork, you won’t stand a chance of solving the enigmas or uncovering the deeper mystery of this strange place.

The co-op design is clever and rewarding, pushing both players to think and act as one. Choose your partner wisely—this is an adventure built on trust and collaboration. A must-try for puzzle fans who love cooperative play.
